- 大幅提升大体积 MKV 文件的进度拖动速度，从数十秒缩短到即时响应
- 修复进度条无法拖动或点击跳转的问题
- 修复部分视频总时长无法正确显示的问题
- 修复权限变更后媒体缩略图显示异常的问题
- 修复未授予所有文件访问权限时部分视频不显示的问题

<details>
<summary>English Version</summary>

- Drastically improve seeking speed for large MKV files, from tens of seconds down to instant response
- Fix seekbar not responding to drag or tap interactions
- Fix video duration not displaying correctly for some media
- Fix media thumbnail display issues after permission changes
- Fix some videos not showing when all files access is not granted

</details>
